LanguageData.RB_BallisticGlass.description: Toughened, multi-layered transparent armor capable of withstanding bullets and explosions, crucial for protecting high-value targets and ensuring safety in hostile environments.
LanguageData.RB_BallisticGlass.label: ballistic glass
LanguageData.RB_Glass.description: Transparent, brittle sheets of silica-based material, widely utilised for windows and various other applications where clarity and rigidity are essential.
LanguageData.RB_Glass.label: glass
